#define MAX_CROSSING_TIME 17;
#define KNIGHT_TIME 1;
#define LADY_TIME 2;
#define KING_TIME 5;
#define QUEEN_TIME 10;
#define POSITION_SOUTH 0;
#define POSITION_NORTH 1;

var elapsedTime = 0;
var knightPosition = POSITION_SOUTH;
var ladyPosition = POSITION_SOUTH;
var kingPosition = POSITION_SOUTH;
var queenPosition = POSITION_SOUTH;

South() =
    [knightPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && ladyPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && kingPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && queenPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_one_knight{knightPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = KNIGHT_TIME;} -> North()
    [] 
    [knightPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && ladyPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && kingPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && queenPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_one_lady{ladyPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = LADY_TIME;} -> North()
    []
    [knightPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && ladyPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && kingPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && queenPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_one_king{kingPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = KING_TIME;} -> North()
    []
    [knightPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && ladyPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && kingPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && queenPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_one_queen{queenPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = QUEEN_TIME;} -> North()
    []
    [knightPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && ladyPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_knight_and_lady{knightPosition = POSITION_NORTH; ladyPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = LADY_TIME;} -> North()
    []
    [knightPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && kingPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_knight_and_king{knightPosition = POSITION_NORTH; kingPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = KING_TIME;} -> North()
    []
    [knightPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && queenPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_knight_and_queen{knightPosition = POSITION_NORTH; queenPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = QUEEN_TIME;} -> North()
    []
    [ladyPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && kingPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_lady_and_king{ladyPosition = POSITION_NORTH; kingPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = KING_TIME;} -> North()
    []
    [ladyPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && queenPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_lady_and_queen{ladyPosition = POSITION_NORTH; queenPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = QUEEN_TIME;} -> North()
    []
    [kingPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && queenPosition == POSITION_SOUTH && elapsedTime == 0]
    cross_king_and_queen{kingPosition = POSITION_NORTH; queenPosition = POSITION_NORTH; elapsedTime = QUEEN_TIME;} -> North();

North() =
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && knightPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_knight{knightPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = KNIGHT_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && ladyPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_lady{ladyPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = LADY_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && kingPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_king{kingPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = KING_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && queenPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_queen{queenPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = QUEEN_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && knightPosition == POSITION_NORTH && ladyPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_knight_and_lady{knightPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; ladyPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = LADY_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && knightPosition == POSITION_NORTH && kingPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_knight_and_king{knightPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; kingPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = KING_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && knightPosition == POSITION_NORTH && queenPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_knight_and_queen{knightPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; queenPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = QUEEN_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && ladyPosition == POSITION_NORTH && kingPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_lady_and_king{ladyPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; kingPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = KING_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && ladyPosition == POSITION_NORTH && queenPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_lady_and_queen{ladyPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; queenPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = QUEEN_TIME;} -> South()
    []
    [elapsedTime < MAX_CROSSING_TIME && kingPosition == POSITION_NORTH && queenPosition == POSITION_NORTH]
    return_king_and_queen{kingPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; queenPosition = POSITION_SOUTH; elapsedTime = QUEEN_TIME;} -> South();
    
#define goal (knightPosition==POSITION_NORTH && ladyPosition==POSITION_NORTH && kingPosition==POSITION_NORTH && queenPosition==POSITION_NORTH);
#define alter ((knightPosition==POSITION_NORTH && ladyPosition==POSITION_NORTH && kingPosition==POSITION_NORTH && queenPosition==POSITION_NORTH && elapsedTime > MAX_CROSSING_TIME) || !(knightPosition==POSITION_NORTH && ladyPosition==POSITION_NORTH && kingPosition==POSITION_NORTH && queenPosition==POSITION_NORTH));
#assert South() reaches goal;
#assert South() reaches goal with min(elapsedTime);
#assert South() reaches goal;
#assert South() |= [] alter;
